name: Conan Package Manager (1.x)
description: Installs Conan 1.x, the open source C/C++ package manager

conanVersion.description: Version of Conan 1.x to install (e.g., '1.66.0', '1.60.2', or 'latest' for newest 1.x)

userHome.description: Home directory for the user (used for Conan cache and settings)
